title: Suitcase with bipki
description: Rename totem of undying to "Bipki" or "Чемодан с бипками"
body:
This resourcepack adds totem of undying in the form of a black suitcase, which will look great with your business suit or other clothes.

You need optifine or CIT Resewn mod to use it.

This resourcepack works with two titles: "Bipki" and "Чемодан с бипками".
